summary: Tested hashtag autocomplete feature - all backend APIs (14/14 tests) and frontend integration working correctly. Backend endpoints /api/hashtags/suggest and /api/hashtags/trending return proper data. Frontend HashtagAutocomplete component renders correctly when # is typed, shows trending hashtags, filters by query, supports keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Escape), and inserts selected hashtag into caption.
seed_data_creation: Hashtags already seeded: surf (45 posts), waves (30), surfing (25), pipeline (22), surfphotography (18), barrels (15), surflife (12), oceanlife (10), surftrip (8), swell (7)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hashtag autocomplete feature fully working. Backend APIs: /api/hashtags/suggest?q={query} returns filtered suggestions sorted by post_count, /api/hashtags/trending returns top hashtags. Frontend: HashtagAutocomplete component in CreatePost.js triggers on # character, shows dropdown with data-testid='hashtag-autocomplete', individual suggestions have data-testid='hashtag-suggestion-{tag}'. Keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Escape) works. Caption textarea has data-testid='caption-input'.

tests: Returns empty list for non-existent query
Hashtags have correct structure (tag, post_count, last_used)
Dropdown appears when # is typed in caption
Shows 'Trending Hashtags' header when query is empty
Shows 'Hashtags matching' header when query is provided
Filters suggestions based on typed query
Selected hashtag inserted into caption with space

backend_apis_tested./api/hashtags/suggest?q=sur: PASS - Returns 5 suggestions: surf, surfing, surfphotography, surflife, surftrip
backend_apis_tested./api/hashtags/trending: PASS - Returns 8 trending hashtags with post counts
